title: Iran-linked actors use Telegram as C2 in malware attacks on dissidents

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Iran-linked actors use Telegram as C2 in malware attacks on 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/24
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*api.telegram*'
            - '*api.telelgram*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
